videos.title: ROSDiscover ICSA conference talk video
videos.description: Video description: This recorded conference talk presents ROSDiscover, a static analysis approach for recovering ROS run-time architecture from code and launch files. The visual track primarily shows presentation slides with the paper title, architecture-recovery workflow, examples of ROS component connections, and evaluation results; the spoken talk explains the same research claims and examples.

videos.title: ProsumerFX mobile image stylization video
videos.description: Video description: This prerecorded video demonstrates ProsumerFX, a mobile app for creating and sharing parameterizable image stylization effects. The visual track shows app screens, photo previews, controls for configuring effects, and before-and-after stylized results.

videos.title: Interactive image filtering with multiple levels of control video
videos.description: Video description: This prerecorded video demonstrates a mobile image-filtering framework with preset selection, global parameter adjustment, and local on-screen painting for fine control. The visual track shows source photos, filter controls, and stylized results such as oil paint and watercolor effects.

videos.title: Pencil Hatching app demo video
videos.description: Video description: The demo shows the Pencil Hatching Android app turning photographs into black-and-white pencil drawings. A user opens a photo, previews a sketched version, changes drawing presets and parameters, and compares the original image with progressively denser hatched results.
